heading: Audits
label: 17940 Audits
text: The Secretary shall provide for periodic audits to ensure that covered entities and business associates that are subject to the requirements of this subchapter and subparts C and E of part 164 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations, as such provisions are in effect as of , comply with such requirements.February 17, 2009
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle D (§ 13400 et seq.) of title XIII of div. A of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of subtitle D to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 111–5123 Stat. 258Feb. 17, 2009
